title: Brain Leech
description:
[jitter]*thunk*[/jitter]

A sharp pain is felt atop your head and a thought stabs into your mind.

[purple][sine]"SHARE KNOWLEDGE???"[/sine][/purple]

You are unsure how to proceed...

options.title: Share Knowledge
options.description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]5[/blue] random cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

options.title: Rip the Leech Off
options.description: Lose [red]5[/red] HP. Gain a Colorless card reward.

notes: The [gold]Share Knowledge[/gold] option shows 5 randomly-generated cards from your character's card pool and allows selecting 1 to add to your deck (non-cancelable). The [gold]Rip the Leech Off[/gold] option deals 5 unblockable, unpowered damage to the player and offers a Colorless card reward presented as a 3-choice selection screen. After Rip, the leech cries out: [purple][sine]"NOOOOOOOOOO..."[/sine][/purple]. After Share Knowledge, the leech becomes satisfied and crawls away.
